refnamediv.refpurpose: Compute minimum accumulated grayscale cost from seed points.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imgraydist(weights, seedPoints) out = imgraydist(weights, seedPoints, connectivity)

listitem.para: Seed coordinates as rows of [x y] image points.
Geodesic distance image initialized from the seed points.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Uses positive image values as traversal costs and computes a shortest-path cost map from one or more [x y] seeds with 4- or 8-connectivity. Low-cost pixels are easier to cross; high-cost pixels make the accumulated distance grow faster.

refsection.title: Examples
